title: adesmia tenella var. macrocarpa
intro: Adesmia tenella var. macrocarpa is a plant species also known as "macha" or "chilca" in the Quechua language, native to the Andean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Adesmia tenella var. macrocarpa include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, pain, and gastrointestinal disorders, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
